data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Reduces decision time by minimizing choices available at each stage.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined navigation and clear call-to-action buttons.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Ensures clickable elements are large enough and positioned for easy reach.
data.technical_spec: Large buttons and links with intuitive spacing.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limits on-page information to enhance cognitive processing.
data.technical_spec: Chunking content and using progressive disclosure.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Designs follow web standards to meet user expectations based on familiarity.
data.technical_spec: Consistent design patterns across the site.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items closely to improve understanding and accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Logical grouping and alignment of content blocks.
